SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-20-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IRA DANIEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOANNA KONG IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS LAN LE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF IRA DANIEL IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOANNA KONG IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU / TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
